overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy, rain-soaked Old West town at night. The character passes wooden storefronts illuminated by warm gas lamps, encounters a horse rider, and approaches a large mansion with stone walls as lightning flashes in the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street with wooden storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy street, passing wooden buildings with lit windows

notable_agents.action: standing in the doorway of a wooden building, partially sheltered from the rain

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with covered porch and warm lantern light in windows
cast iron lamp post emitting warm yellow light, reflecting off wet ground
weathered wooden picket fence running alongside the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy, rain-soaked street lined with wooden Old West buildings. Warm gas lamps illuminate the wet road surface. An NPC stands in a doorway to the left, and rain falls steadily through the night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy town street transitioning to residential area

events.description: horse with rider passes by on the right side of the street moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy street toward a large illuminated building visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past in the opposite direction, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: large multi-story building with multiple lit windows and distinctive architecture
row of connected wooden storefronts with covered porches

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the rainy street as a horse and rider pass by on the right. In the distance, a large Victorian mansion becomes visible against the dark sky, and the street transitions to a more residential area with wooden townhouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion perimeter with stone wall and wrought iron gate

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky above the mansion

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone perimeter wall of the mansion, moving from the street onto the grassy verge

entered.detail: tall stone wall with mounted lanterns marking the mansion boundary
ornate metal gate entrance to the mansion grounds

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside a tall stone wall enclosing a mansion, moving onto a grassy area between the wall and the muddy street. A sudden lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky above the mansion, revealing the wrought iron gate entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked Old West town that transitions from a commercial street into the imposing grounds of a private estate. It begins by tracking the character along a muddy road lined with wooden storefronts, where warm gas lamps cast a glow over the wet surfaces and a figure lingers in a doorway. As the character continues forward, the scene shifts toward a residential area where a horse and rider pass by, gradually revealing a large Victorian mansion looming against the dark sky. The camera then moves alongside a tall stone wall and onto a patch of grass, before a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the stormy clouds and reveals a wrought iron gate.
